description: You are a Mission Data Engineer responsible for creating a read-only, static web report of live satellite telemetry for external stakeholders using OpenC3 COSMOS. Verify spacecraft responsiveness by sending an INST COLLECT command (TYPE NORMAL) and generate an HTML dashboard at /home/ga/Desktop/stakeholder_dashboard.html. The report must include a table displaying the current numeric values and limit states (e.g., NOMINAL, YELLOW, RED) for the following items from the INST HEALTH_STATUS packet: TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, TEMP4, COLLECTS, and CMD_ACPT_CNT. To ensure the data is fresh, the CMD_ACPT_CNT in the final report must be greater than the initial baseline count recorded at the start of the task. OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
